languages.text: "Пожалуй, мне не стоит удивляться, что тебе известно это имя. Не буду скрывать: Амелла — инквизитор Амелла — была моей покровительницей. Она принадлежала к Ордо Ксенос и во многом разделяла мои взгляды на технологии других рас. Как и я, она верила, что мы должны использовать знания ксеносов на благо Человечества. Мы образовали прекрасный тандем, но наш союз оставался в тайне — во многом, из-за людей подобных Диодасу".

"I suppose I shouldn't be surprised that you know that name. I don't hide it: Amella, Inquisitor Amella, was my patroness. She belonged to the Ordo Xenos and largely shared my views on the technologies of other races. Like me, she believed we should use xenos knowledge for the benefit of Humanity. We formed an excellent partnership, yet our alliance remained secret, largely because of the likes of Diodas."

We formed an excellent partnership, yet our alliance remained secret, largely because of people such as Diodas."

She belonged to the Ordo Xenos and largely shared my views on the technologies of other races. Like me, she believed we should use xenos knowledge for the benefit of Humanity. languages.text: "Ich sollte wohl überrascht sein, dass Euch dieser Name geläufig ist. Ich mache keinen Hehl daraus: Amella, Inquisitorin Amella, war meine Patronin. Sie gehörte dem Ordo Xenos an und teilte meine Ansichten über die Technologien anderer Völker. Sie war wie ich der Meinung, dass wir Xenos-Technologien zum Wohl der Menschheit nutzen sollten. Wir hatten eine ausgezeichnete Partnerschaft, aber unsere Allianz musste wegen Leuten wie Diodas geheim bleiben."
languages.original_text: "I suppose I shouldn't be surprised that you know that name. I don't hide it: Amella, Inquisitor Amella, was my patroness. She belonged to the Ordo Xenos and largely shared my views on the technologies of other races. Like me, she believed we should use xenos knowledge for the benefit of Humanity. We formed an excellent partnership, yet our alliance remained secret, largely because of the likes of Diodas."

traits.locale_text: "Ich sollte wohl überrascht sein, dass Euch dieser Name geläufig ist. Ich mache keinen Hehl daraus: Amella, Inquisitorin Amella, war meine Patronin. Sie gehörte dem Ordo Xenos an und teilte meine Ansichten über die Technologien anderer Völker. Sie war wie ich der Meinung, dass wir Xenos-Technologien zum Wohl der Menschheit nutzen sollten. Wir hatten eine ausgezeichnete Partnerschaft, aber unsere Allianz musste wegen Leuten wie Diodas geheim bleiben."

languages.text: « J'imagine que je ne devrais pas être surpris d'apprendre que vous connaissez ce nom. Je ne m'en suis jamais caché : Amella, ou plutôt l'inquisitrice Amella, était ma protectrice. Elle appartenait à l'Ordo Xénos et partageait globalement mes idées quant aux technologies des autres espèces. Comme moi, elle voulait utiliser le savoir des xénos pour faire progresser l'humanité. Nous formions un excellent duo, mais notre alliance est toujours restée secrète, en grande partie à cause de gens comme Diodas. »
languages.original_text: "I suppose I shouldn't be surprised that you know that name. I don't hide it: Amella, Inquisitor Amella, was my patroness. She belonged to the Ordo Xenos and largely shared my views on the technologies of other races. Like me, she believed we should use xenos knowledge for the benefit of Humanity. We formed an excellent partnership, yet our alliance remained secret, largely because of the likes of Diodas."

traits.locale_text: « J'imagine que je ne devrais pas être surpris d'apprendre que vous connaissez ce nom. Je ne m'en suis jamais caché : Amella, ou plutôt l'inquisitrice Amella, était ma protectrice. Elle appartenait à l'Ordo Xénos et partageait globalement mes idées quant aux technologies des autres espèces. Comme moi, elle voulait utiliser le savoir des xénos pour faire progresser l'humanité. Nous formions un excellent duo, mais notre alliance est toujours restée secrète, en grande partie à cause de gens comme Diodas. »

languages.text: «Supongo que no debería sorprenderme de que conozca su nombre. No lo ocultaré: Amella, la Inquisidora Amella, era mi patrona. Era miembro del Ordo Xenos y, en general, compartía mi opinión sobre las tecnologías de otras razas. Al igual que yo, creía que podíamos usar el conocimiento de los xenos en beneficio de la Humanidad. Formamos una alianza excelente, aunque nos vimos obligados a guardarla en secreto por gente como Diodas».
languages.original_text: "I suppose I shouldn't be surprised that you know that name. I don't hide it: Amella, Inquisitor Amella, was my patroness. She belonged to the Ordo Xenos and largely shared my views on the technologies of other races. Like me, she believed we should use xenos knowledge for the benefit of Humanity. We formed an excellent partnership, yet our alliance remained secret, largely because of the likes of Diodas."

traits.locale_text: «Supongo que no debería sorprenderme de que conozca su nombre. No lo ocultaré: Amella, la Inquisidora Amella, era mi patrona. Era miembro del Ordo Xenos y, en general, compartía mi opinión sobre las tecnologías de otras razas. Al igual que yo, creía que podíamos usar el conocimiento de los xenos en beneficio de la Humanidad. Formamos una alianza excelente, aunque nos vimos obligados a guardarla en secreto por gente como Diodas».

languages.text: "Bu ismi bilmene şaşırmamam gerekirdi sanırım. Saklamıyorum: Engizitör Amella benim hamimdi. Zeno Nizamı'na mensuptu ve büyük ölçüde diğer ırkların teknolojilerine dair görüşlerimi paylaşıyordu. Benim gibi o da İnsanlığın yararı için zeno bilgilerini kullanmamız gerektiğine inanıyordu. Mükemmel bir ortaklık kurduk ancak ittifakımız, büyük ölçüde Diodas gibiler yüzünden gizli kaldı."
languages.original_text: "I suppose I shouldn't be surprised that you know that name. I don't hide it: Amella, Inquisitor Amella, was my patroness. She belonged to the Ordo Xenos and largely shared my views on the technologies of other races. Like me, she believed we should use xenos knowledge for the benefit of Humanity. We formed an excellent partnership, yet our alliance remained secret, largely because of the likes of Diodas."

Zeno Nizamı'na mensuptu ve büyük ölçüde diğer ırkların teknolojilerine dair görüşlerimi paylaşıyordu. Benim gibi o da İnsanlığın yararı için zeno bilgilerini kullanmamız gerektiğine inanıyordu. Mükemmel bir ortaklık kurduk ancak ittifakımız, büyük ölçüde Diodas gibiler yüzünden gizli kaldı."

languages.text: “你知道那个名字，想来我也不必大惊小怪。我没有刻意隐瞒。阿梅拉，也就是审判官阿梅拉，曾是我的庇护者。她隶属于异形审判庭，在对待异族科技的问题上，与我的看法大体一致。她和我一样，认为应该利用异形的知识来造福人类。我们之间的合作非常默契，不过这层关系从未公之于众，主要就是因为狄奥达斯那样的人。”
languages.original_text: "I suppose I shouldn't be surprised that you know that name. I don't hide it: Amella, Inquisitor Amella, was my patroness. She belonged to the Ordo Xenos and largely shared my views on the technologies of other races. Like me, she believed we should use xenos knowledge for the benefit of Humanity. We formed an excellent partnership, yet our alliance remained secret, largely because of the likes of Diodas."

traits.locale_text: “你知道那个名字，想来我也不必大惊小怪。我没有刻意隐瞒。阿梅拉，也就是审判官阿梅拉，曾是我的庇护者。她隶属于异形审判庭，在对待异族科技的问题上，与我的看法大体一致。她和我一样，认为应该利用异形的知识来造福人类。我们之间的合作非常默契，不过这层关系从未公之于众，主要就是因为狄奥达斯那样的人。”

languages.text: 「あなたがその名を存じていることに驚かないでください。私はそれを隠していません。アメラ、インキジター・アメラは私の庇護者でした。彼女はオルド・ゼノスに属し、他の種族の技術に関する私の見解を大きく共有していました。私と同じく、彼女は異種族の知識を人類の利益のために使うべきだと信じていました。私たちは優れたパートナーシップを築きましたが、その同盟は、ディオダスのような人々のおかげで、主に秘密にされました。」
languages.original_text: "I suppose I shouldn't be surprised that you know that name. I don't hide it: Amella, Inquisitor Amella, was my patroness. She belonged to the Ordo Xenos and largely shared my views on the technologies of other races. Like me, she believed we should use xenos knowledge for the benefit of Humanity. We formed an excellent partnership, yet our alliance remained secret, largely because of the likes of Diodas."
